database_info.name: DSPPA Miscellaneous & Zero-Price Items Database
database_info.IMPORTANT_NOTE: Items with $0 pricing are either discontinued, bundled with other products, or require project-level quotation. The 'redistribute_to' field indicates which main database these belong to.
